name: veo-video-generator
description: AI video generation for Claude — Veo 3.1 (fal.ai + Gemini), Happy Horse (Alibaba), and Seedance 2.0 (ByteDance). Text-to-video, image-to-video, first+last frame, reference images, and video extension. Supports both fal.ai and Google Gemini API keys.
author: michaelericksonh5

veo-video.description: Veo 3.1, Happy Horse, and Seedance 2.0 video generation via fal.ai and Gemini
